title: Oriented Birds continue their march against Infantry
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Oriented Birds Football Club...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Oriented Birds Football Club sank newly promoted Infantry School 3-1 in a entertaining Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League encounter at Kwanokuthula Stadium on Saturday 26 October.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Oriented Birds Football Club sank newly promoted Infantry School 3-1 in a entertaining Western Cape ABC Motsepe Provincial League encounter at Kwanokuthula Stadium on Saturday 26 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Avela \"Keita\" Qondo and Khanyisani \"Mashesha\" Radebe (brace) scored for Oriented Birds, while Samnkele Dyasi scored for the Oudtshoorn-based visitors.","html":"Avela \"Keita\" Qondo and Khanyisani \"Mashesha\" Radebe (brace) scored for Oriented Birds, while Samnkele Dyasi scored for the Oudtshoorn-based visitors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With 7 points, the Birds - who have two victories from three games, drawing the third - top the log in Western Cape ABC Motsepe stream B. Infantry School FC are in the bottom half of the log having lost their two opening games.","html":"With 7 points, the Birds - who have two victories from three games, drawing the third - top the log in Western Cape ABC Motsepe stream B. Infantry School FC are in the bottom half of the log having lost their two opening games."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The game got off to a good start with the visitors building their passes from the centre - trying to get the ball rolling on the ground.","html":"The game got off to a good start with the visitors building their passes from the centre - trying to get the ball rolling on the ground."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Soaked up pressure","html":"Soaked up pressure"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds' backline soaked up the pressure, defending against offensive play from Infantry's flanks.","html":"The Birds' backline soaked up the pressure, defending against offensive play from Infantry's flanks."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Birds then took the game from the visitors, attacking from centre-left of the field - Qondo netted their first goal within the first 10 minutes of action."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Infantry then fought back, looking for the equaliser.","html":"Infantry then fought back, looking for the equaliser."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Exciting star","html":"Exciting star"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Both sides played an attacking style of soccer. Exciting left-footed young star Samnkelo Saliwe of Infantry was very sharp on the ball, creating space in the centre - spreading the ball to the wings.","html":"Both sides played an attacking style of soccer. Exciting left-footed young star Samnkelo Saliwe of Infantry was very sharp on the ball, creating space in the centre - spreading the ball to the wings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The visitors received a penalty after their hard work, on the right side of the field.","html":"The visitors received a penalty after their hard work, on the right side of the field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dyasi scored from this, beating Birds' goalkeeper Zakhe Xhotho.","html":"Dyasi scored from this, beating Birds' goalkeeper Zakhe Xhotho."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Well-taken shot","html":"Well-taken shot"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The home team started the second half at a fast pace. They were awarded a free kick just outside the box after a dangerous foul by an Infantry defender.","html":"The home team started the second half at a fast pace. They were awarded a free kick just outside the box after a dangerous foul by an Infantry defender."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Radebe beat Infantry goalkeeper Sibongile Tshofuthi with a well-taken shot.","html":"Radebe beat Infantry goalkeeper Sibongile Tshofuthi with a well-taken shot."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The visitors then worked overtime, defending against offensive play by the Birds wingers.","html":"The visitors then worked overtime, defending against offensive play by the Birds wingers."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Infantry tried to use their physical strength on the ball, but it was not easy for them to break through the Birds' stubborn defenders."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds players gained more confidence during the last moments of the game, and thanks to Infantry defenders failing to clear the ball in their danger area, Radebe scored with a powerful volley.","html":"The Birds players gained more confidence during the last moments of the game, and thanks to Infantry defenders failing to clear the ball in their danger area, Radebe scored with a powerful volley."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Birds collected maximum points at home.","html":"The Birds collected maximum points at home."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Oriented Birds continue their march against Infantry
